entity.name: NACION SEGUROS S.A.
entity.address: San Martín 913, C1004AAS, Ciudad Autónoma de Buenos Aires
entity.ranking: #1 government contractor by total contract value

legal_mechanism.effect: Mandated all national public sector entities (under Ley 24.156 Art. 8) to contract insurance exclusively through Nación Seguros S.A. in all branches where it operates
legal_mechanism.justification_claimed: State should contract with its own provider entities; retain premiums domestically rather than paying international reinsurers
legal_mechanism.actual_effect: Created a captive monopoly that was exploited by politically-connected brokers who inserted themselves as intermediaries to collect billions in commissions
legal_mechanism.predecessor_law: Ley 16.793 - historically required state insurance through Caja Nacional de Ahorro y Seguro

scandal.name: Escándalo de los Seguros / Causa Seguros
scandal.summary_es: Funcionarios infieles aprovecharon la contratación obligatoria con Nación Seguros para insertar brokers amigos del presidente Alberto Fernández, desviando miles de millones en comisiones de fondos públicos
scandal.summary_en: Corrupt officials exploited the mandatory contracting decree to insert politically-connected brokers as intermediaries in state insurance policies, diverting billions of pesos in commissions from public funds
scandal.agencies_affected: 20+ public organisms including ANSES, Gendarmería, National Highways, the Mint, Road Operators SA, Fund for the Arts, Supreme Court, and four ministries

judicial_case.status: Active - prosecutions ongoing as of February 2026
judicial_case.raids: 24 raids ordered by Judge Ercolini in April 2024

government_response.intermediaries_banned: Government prohibited all intermediaries/brokers in state insurance policies (April 2024)
government_response.contract_non_renewal: Government officially did not renew contract with Nación Seguros (March 2024)

findings.role: Insurance broker, husband of María Cantero (Alberto Fernández's personal secretary)
findings.entity: Héctor Martínez Sosa y Compañía S.A.
findings.political_affiliation: Peronism / Frente de Todos (intimate circle of Alberto Fernández)
findings.evidence_es: Segundo broker más importante por comisiones pagadas por Nación Seguros entre 2020-2024, cobrando $366.635.744. Fernández fue su asesor entre 2010-2019 antes de ser presidente. Se reunía con Fernández en la Quinta de Olivos sin dejar registro. Su empresa fue procesada como partícipe necesario en negociaciones incompatibles con la función pública y embargada por $2.870.729.545,61
findings.evidence_en: Second most important broker by commissions paid by Nación Seguros between 2020-2024, collecting $366.6M ARS. Fernández was his advisor from 2010-2019 before becoming president. Met with Fernández at the Olivos presidential residence without records. His company was prosecuted as necessary participant in dealings incompatible with public office, embargoed for $2.87B ARS

findings.evidence_es: Firmó el Decreto 823/2021 que obligó al Estado a contratar exclusivamente con Nación Seguros, creando el monopolio que fue explotado por sus amigos brokers. Intervino como presidente para favorecer los negocios de Martínez Sosa. La Justicia pidió sus registros migratorios para investigar viajes con el broker
findings.evidence_en: Signed Decree 823/2021 mandating exclusive state contracting with Nación Seguros, creating the monopoly exploited by his broker friends. Intervened as president to favor Martínez Sosa's business. Justice requested his migration records to investigate trips with the broker

findings.role: Top-ranking insurance broker by commission volume
findings.evidence_es: Broker #1 por comisiones: facturó $1.665,7 millones entre 2021 y primer trimestre 2024. Solo en el contrato de Gendarmería cobró $1.363 mil millones en comisiones. Embargada por $9.669 mil millones de pesos
findings.evidence_en: Top broker by commissions: invoiced $1.665B ARS between 2021 and Q1 2024. On the Gendarmería contract alone, charged $1.363B ARS in commissions. Embargoed for $9.669B ARS

findings.role: Former General Administrator of the Quinta de Olivos presidential residence
findings.entity: Presidencia de la Nación - Quinta de Olivos
findings.evidence_es: Procesado por facilitar reuniones repetidas entre el broker Martínez Sosa y el presidente Fernández en la Quinta de Olivos sin dejar registro, a sabiendas del plan criminal
findings.evidence_en: Prosecuted for facilitating repeated unrecorded meetings between broker Martínez Sosa and President Fernández at the Olivos presidential residence, with knowledge of the criminal plan

findings.role: Personal secretary of President Alberto Fernández
findings.evidence_es: Esposa de Héctor Martínez Sosa. Chats explosivos entre ella y su marido revelaron coordinación del esquema de comisiones desde la Secretaría Presidencial. Su marido manejó comisiones por más de $2.060 millones en cuatro años
findings.evidence_en: Wife of Héctor Martínez Sosa. Explosive chat messages between her and her husband revealed coordination of the commission scheme from the Presidential Secretary's office. Her husband managed commissions exceeding $2.06B ARS over four years

findings.role: Former General Manager of Nación Seguros (promoted under Milei, originally placed under Fernández)
findings.political_affiliation: La Cámpora / Peronism (started political career at 19 under José Ottavis in Juventud Peronista)
findings.evidence_es: Comenzó como gerente comercial del sector público en Nación Seguros bajo Alberto Fernández, luego fue ascendido a gerente general por el gobierno de Milei. La Justicia lo allanó en su casa y oficina, acusado de actuar como contacto con la firma San Ignacio beneficiada por contratos. Despedido tras el escándalo
findings.evidence_en: Started as commercial manager of the public sector at Nación Seguros under Alberto Fernández, then promoted to general manager by the Milei government. Justice raided his home and office, accused of acting as a contact with the firm San Ignacio which benefited from contracts. Fired after the scandal broke

findings.role: Current President of Nación Seguros (since February 2024)
findings.political_affiliation: La Libertad Avanza / linked to Martín Menem (Chamber of Deputies President)
findings.evidence_es: Designado presidente de Nación Seguros en febrero 2024 gracias a sus vínculos con Martín Menem. Abogado egresado de Universidad de Belgrano (misma universidad que Menem). Antes de su designación, su presencia en registros públicos era casi inexistente - sin fotos ni apariciones en medios. Enigmático nombramiento político
findings.evidence_en: Designated president of Nación Seguros in February 2024 through his links to Martín Menem (Chamber of Deputies President). Lawyer from Universidad de Belgrano (same university as Menem). Before his appointment, his public record presence was nearly nonexistent - no photos or media appearances. Enigmatic political appointment

findings.evidence_es: Vicepresidente actual de Nación Seguros designado por el gobierno de Milei
findings.evidence_en: Current vice president of Nación Seguros appointed by the Milei government

findings.evidence_es: Director actual de Nación Seguros designado por el gobierno de Milei
findings.evidence_en: Current director of Nación Seguros appointed by the Milei government

findings.role: Former President of Nación Seguros board (Macri era, 2016-2019)
findings.evidence_es: Presidente del directorio de Nación Seguros durante el gobierno de Macri, designado en 2016. También fue presidente de Seguros y Retiro dentro del grupo Nación desde diciembre 2015
findings.evidence_en: Board president of Nación Seguros during the Macri government, designated in 2016. Also served as president of Seguros y Retiro within the Nación group since December 2015

findings.role: Former Vice President of Nación Seguros board (Macri era); later appointed to AGN
findings.entity: Nación Seguros S.A. / Auditoría General de la Nación
findings.evidence_es: Vicepresidenta del directorio de Nación Seguros durante el gobierno de Macri (2016-2019). Posteriormente designada como autoridad de la AGN (Auditoría General de la Nación) - el mismo organismo que debería controlar externamente a Nación Seguros. Puerta giratoria entre la empresa auditada y el auditor
findings.evidence_en: Vice president of Nación Seguros board during the Macri government (2016-2019). Subsequently appointed as an authority at AGN (National Audit Office) - the same body responsible for external oversight of Nación Seguros. Revolving door between the audited entity and the auditor

direct_contracting_mechanism.description_es: El Estado argentino tiene un patrón histórico de contratación directa con aseguradoras estatales, evitando licitaciones abiertas. La Ley 16.793 estableció originalmente la obligación. El Decreto 823/2021 de Fernández la modernizó, obligando a todos los organismos del sector público nacional a contratar exclusivamente con Nación Seguros. Esto se combinó con la inserción de brokers intermediarios políticamente conectados que cobraban comisiones millonarias sin agregar valor. Los municipios y provincias replican el patrón con Provincia Seguros y Provincia ART bajo la Ley Orgánica Municipal que permite contratación directa con entes donde el Estado tiene participación mayoritaria
direct_contracting_mechanism.description_en: The Argentine State has a historical pattern of direct contracting with state-owned insurers, bypassing open tenders. Law 16,793 originally established the obligation. Fernández's Decree 823/2021 modernized it, mandating all national public sector bodies to contract exclusively with Nación Seguros. This was combined with the insertion of politically-connected broker intermediaries who charged massive commissions without adding value. Municipalities and provinces replicate the pattern with Provincia Seguros and Provincia ART under the Municipal Organic Law that permits direct contracting with entities where the State holds majority participation
legal_basis: Ley Orgánica Municipal (permits direct contracting with state-majority entities)

Nación Seguros S.A..role: General insurance for all national public sector entities

Provincia Seguros S.A..parent: Grupo Provincia (Banco de la Provincia de Buenos Aires)
Provincia Seguros S.A..role: General insurance for Buenos Aires province and municipal governments
Provincia Seguros S.A..mechanism: Direct contracting permitted under Municipal Organic Law for state-majority entities

Provincia ART S.A..parent: Grupo Provincia (Banco de la Provincia de Buenos Aires)
Provincia ART S.A..role: Workers' compensation (ART) insurance for Buenos Aires province entities
Provincia ART S.A..note: Province of Buenos Aires terminated affiliation in 2007 and became self-insured, but municipalities continue to contract directly
Provincia ART S.A..example_contract: Collective life insurance $3.13M ARS + ART $55.51M ARS for 3,130 employees (2024)

state_insurance_network.pattern_description: State-owned insurance companies at both national and provincial levels receive billions in contracts through direct contracting mechanisms that bypass competitive bidding. Each level of government (national, provincial, municipal) has its own state insurer that captures mandatory coverage. The pattern creates captive markets vulnerable to political manipulation through broker intermediaries.

SIGEN.finding: Held audit committee meetings with Nación Seguros - analyzed regulatory background, internal audit unit composition, verified execution of annual plans
SIGEN.concern: As internal control dependent on the President, independence is compromised when the President himself is implicated in the scheme

AGN.role: External control body (subsequent audit of legality, transparency, efficiency)
AGN.finding: Rita Almada, former Nación Seguros VP, was later appointed as AGN authority - revolving door concern
AGN.concern: Revolving door between audited entity and auditor undermines external oversight

metadata.confidence: high - based on judicial proceedings, official decrees, and investigative journalism from Infobae, La Nación, and Clarín
